eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Clark, WA; Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; at 3:07 PM on JUL 10, 2019 Effective until 5:07 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
